title: BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.OVERRIDE_ACTIVATED — Prescriber override activated
description: Resource event emitted by AGG.BSP.001.TIE.TIER_OF_CASE when CMD.APPLY_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE successfully activates a prescriber override. The override pauses algorithmic tier transitions until ARB closes it. BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.ARB consumes this event to begin its validation cycle.

event_id.description: Unique identifier of this resource event.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case.

override_id.description: Unique identifier of the override (caller-supplied at command time).

from_tier_code.description: Tier code the case was in before the override (algorithmic state).

applied_tier_code.description: Tier code the prescriber forces on the case.

rationale.description: Human-readable justification recorded for audit (visible to ARB during validation).

valid_until.description: Optional — when set, the override is candidate for closure after this timestamp. Closure still goes through ARB.

validation_state.description: Initial validation state — always PENDING_ARBITRATION on activation. Transitions to CONFIRMED_BY_ARBITRATION via CMD.CONFIRM_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE (silent, no bus event).

tier_definitions_version.description: BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE definitions version used to validate applied_tier_code at activation time.

occurred_at.description: Timestamp at which the aggregate committed the override activation (ISO-8601, UTC).
